prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为11256→11566→12466→15554→18134，呈持续后移趋势，近两年加速明显：2024年后移3088名，2025年再后移2580名，累计5年后移6878名；2025年基准位次约18134名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年60人→2022年56人→2023年48人→2024年51人→2025年52人→2026年48人，2026年较2025年缩招4人（-7.7%），计划减少意味着竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第66名，近年排名稳定在65–72名区间，属于财经类顶尖院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及学校预约入校政策等常规管理事项，无负面舆情；抖音热度评价为一般（总排名第92位），短视频曝光量较低；2021–2025年均无投档断档或暴跌记录，录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估：应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统计学A-，共3个A-及以上学科；金融学类、会计学、工商管理类等招生专业对应优势学科，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2026年热度为分化观望，会计/财务/审计类为分化观望；浙江省考生总数2021年25.3万→2025年29.1万→2026年约40万（普通高考总人数），增幅约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；西南财经大学位于四川省成都市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；浙江省为综合改革省份，考生不分文理，统一竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招7.7%、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%以及学校声誉平稳等因素，2026年竞争预计进一步加剧。，叠加考生规模大增带来的额外竞争压力，预测最低位次约17497名，区间16997–17997名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16997–17997名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（参考2025年一档专业最低位次约7330–8163名，差距较大，录取概率较低），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如低于16997名）可适当增加一档专业填报数量。西南财经大学应用经济学A+为全国顶尖学科，金融学类、财政学类等对应专业含金量高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were 11256 → 11566 → 12466 → 15554 → 18134, showing a continuous backward trend with accelerated decline in recent two years: a backward shift of 3088 places in 2024, another 2580 places in 2025, and a cumulative backward shift of 6878 places over five years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 18134; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province was 60 in 2021 → 56 in 2022 → 48 in 2023 → 51 in 2024 → 52 in 2025 → 48 in 2026, with a reduction of 4 students (-7.7%) in 2026 compared to 2025, indicating intensified competition due to the decrease in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 65–72 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, involving only routine management matters such as the university's appointment-based campus entry policy, with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity evaluation is average (overall ranking 92nd), with low short video exposure; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops, with stable admission trends; fifth round discipline evaluation: Applied Economics A+ (national top), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, totaling three A- and above disciplines; majors such as Finance, Accounting, and Business Administration correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of finance/banking/economics majors is divided and wait-and-see, while accounting/finance/auditing majors are also divided and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province was 253,000 in 2021 → 291,000 in 2025 → approximately 400,000 in 2026 (total general college entrance examination participants), an increase of about 37.6%, significantly intensifying competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local university in Zhejiang, with no local enrollment preference; Zhejiang Province is a comprehensive reform province, where candidates are not divided into arts and sciences and compete uniformly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 7.7% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, and the stable university reputation, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026. Combined with the additional competitive pressure from the significant increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17497, with a range of 16997–17997.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 16997–17997, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (referencing the minimum ranking of Tier 1 majors in 2025 at approximately 7330–8163, a significant gap, making admission probability low), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 16997), you can appropriately increase the number of Tier 1 majors applied. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics' Applied Economics A+ is a national top discipline, and corresponding majors such as Finance and Public Finance are highly valuable, worthy of focused attention.
